_comment: Per-domain classification overrides. Used by daily_intercom_report.py before falling through to HubSpot signals. Add a domain when HubSpot's single-record-per-company model misclassifies it (multi-region agencies, etc.).
_region_values: Either a hard region ('AU' or 'UK'), or 'from_intercom' to skip HubSpot's company-level country and trust the per-user Intercom location instead. Use 'from_intercom' for global agencies with offices in multiple regions.
_type_values: Either 'Publisher' or 'Advertiser'. Hard override — wins over HubSpot pipeline/owner/publisher_size signals.
